testsuite.name: com.github.maskedkunisquat.musicmanager.logic.Phase0HarnessTest

testcase.name: phase 0 done-when - init world, tick 60 days, every event has at least 2 response options

testsuite.system-out: === Phase 0 Harness: seed=42, 60 ticks === Roster: [Golden Birds (pop), Golden Stars (r&b), Silent Ghosts (folk), Silent Tides (hip-hop), New Flowers (indie-rock)] Events: 993 total [day 8] NeedUrgent > Schedule an unstructured studio session this week > Green-light the experimental EP pitch > Book a writing retreat for next month [day 8] NeedUrgent > Host a label family dinner this week > Arrange a collab session with another roster artist > Send a personal check-in and schedule a call [day 9] NeedUrgent > Schedule an unstructured studio session this week > Green-light the experimental EP pitch > Book a writing retreat for next month [day 9] NeedUrgent > Host a label family dinner this week > Arrange a collab session with another roster artist > Send a personal check-in and schedule a call [day 9] NeedUrgent > Grant full creative control for their next single > Let them choose the lead single from the shortlist > Schedule a creative direction meeting to hear them out
